build.build_command: cargo build --manifest-path /workspace/warp/Cargo.toml -p warp --bin warp-oss --bin warpctrl --features warp_control_cli,gui
build.warpctrl_env_note: All executed commands were logged using $WARPCTRL, set to /workspace/warp/target/debug/warpctrl in /tmp/warpctrl-drive-auth-execution/env.sh.

runtime.runtime_feature_flag: FeatureFlag::WarpControlCli enabled via OSS debug build with cargo feature warp_control_cli; local-control discovery confirmed.
runtime.permission_seed: LocalControlAllowOutsideWarp and all outside-Warp permission categories plus LocalControlInsideWarpAuthenticatedUserActions set true in isolated user_preferences.json.

validation_cases.expected_result: Denial: authenticated-user Drive list requires verified Warp-terminal invocation; outside-Warp invocation must be rejected before Drive object access.
validation_cases.actual_result: {"error": {"code": "execution_context_not_allowed", "message": "drive.list cannot run from the requested invocation context"}, "ok": false}
validation_cases.permission_state: Outside-Warp control and all outside-Warp permission categories pre-enabled in isolated private preferences; authenticated-user/verified Warp-terminal proof unavailable.

validation_cases.expected_result: Denial: authenticated-user Drive list requires verified Warp-terminal invocation; outside-Warp invocation must be rejected before Drive object access.
validation_cases.actual_result: {"error": {"code": "execution_context_not_allowed", "message": "drive.list cannot run from the requested invocation context"}, "ok": false}
validation_cases.permission_state: Outside-Warp control and all outside-Warp permission categories pre-enabled in isolated private preferences; authenticated-user/verified Warp-terminal proof unavailable.

validation_cases.expected_result: Denial: authenticated-user Drive list requires verified Warp-terminal invocation; outside-Warp invocation must be rejected before Drive object access.
validation_cases.actual_result: {"error": {"code": "execution_context_not_allowed", "message": "drive.list cannot run from the requested invocation context"}, "ok": false}
validation_cases.permission_state: Outside-Warp control and all outside-Warp permission categories pre-enabled in isolated private preferences; authenticated-user/verified Warp-terminal proof unavailable.

validation_cases.expected_result: Denial: Drive inspect requires verified Warp-terminal invocation; outside-Warp invocation must be rejected before object ID lookup. Dummy ID used because Drive list denial produced no disposable object ID.
validation_cases.actual_result: {"error": {"code": "execution_context_not_allowed", "message": "drive.inspect cannot run from the requested invocation context"}, "ok": false}
validation_cases.permission_state: Outside-Warp control and all outside-Warp permission categories pre-enabled in isolated private preferences; authenticated-user/verified Warp-terminal proof unavailable.

validation_cases.expected_result: Denial: workflow execution is underlying-data mutation requiring authenticated verified Warp-terminal grant; outside-Warp invocation must be rejected before workflow lookup. Dummy ID used because Drive list denial produced no workflow ID.
validation_cases.actual_result: {"error": {"code": "execution_context_not_allowed", "message": "drive.workflow.run cannot run from the requested invocation context"}, "ok": false}
validation_cases.permission_state: Outside-Warp control and all outside-Warp permission categories pre-enabled in isolated private preferences; authenticated-user/verified Warp-terminal proof unavailable.

validation_cases.expected_result: Denial: input.run is underlying-data mutation requiring authenticated verified Warp-terminal grant; outside-Warp invocation must be rejected without executing command text.
validation_cases.actual_result: {"error": {"code": "execution_context_not_allowed", "message": "input.run cannot run from the requested invocation context"}, "ok": false}
validation_cases.permission_state: Outside-Warp control and all outside-Warp permission categories pre-enabled in isolated private preferences; authenticated-user/verified Warp-terminal proof unavailable.

validation_cases.command: $WARPCTRL --output-format json drive list --type workflow (inside verified Warp terminal, logged-in user)
validation_cases.expected_result: Success path would return workflow Drive metadata for logged-in disposable test user with authenticated-user grant.
validation_cases.actual_result: Not executed; no disposable test credentials and no app-issued WARPCTRL_TERMINAL_PROOF_* material available in this validation environment.
validation_cases.skip_reason: Requires logged-in disposable Warp user and registry-issued verified terminal proof; unavailable in sandbox. Denial path captured in cases 001-003.

validation_cases.command: $WARPCTRL --output-format json drive inspect <DRIVE_OBJECT_ID_FROM_DRIVE_LIST> (inside verified Warp terminal, logged-in user)
validation_cases.expected_result: Success path would inspect a Drive object returned from Drive list.
validation_cases.actual_result: Not executed; Drive list success did not run and produced no object ID because authenticated success prerequisites were unavailable.
validation_cases.skip_reason: Requires disposable logged-in user, verified terminal proof, and a Drive object ID from successful Drive list. Denial path captured in case 004.

validation_cases.command: $WARPCTRL --output-format json drive workflow run <WORKFLOW_ID_FROM_DRIVE_LIST> --arg validation=warpctrl (inside verified Warp terminal, logged-in user)
validation_cases.expected_result: Success path would execute a disposable workflow with argument validation=warpctrl.
validation_cases.actual_result: Not executed; no disposable workflow/test account and no verified terminal proof available.
validation_cases.skip_reason: Unsafe/non-disposable mutation without test credentials/resources; denial path captured in case 005.

validation_cases.command: $WARPCTRL --output-format json input run "printf warpctrl-validation" (inside verified Warp terminal, logged-in user)
validation_cases.expected_result: Success path would run text in the targeted terminal session.
validation_cases.actual_result: Not executed; command execution is high-risk and requires authenticated verified Warp-terminal grant that was unavailable.
validation_cases.skip_reason: High-risk execution success path requires app-issued terminal proof and disposable environment; denial path captured in case 006.

blockers: No disposable authenticated Warp test credentials/resources were available.

No app-issued WARPCTRL_TERMINAL_PROOF_ID/WARPCTRL_TERMINAL_SESSION_ID/WARPCTRL_TERMINAL_PROOF_SECRET path was exposed to the standalone validation shell, so inside-Warp authenticated success paths could not be exercised.
Drive list success was unavailable, so DRIVE_OBJECT_ID_FROM_DRIVE_LIST and WORKFLOW_ID_FROM_DRIVE_LIST could not be obtained; dummy IDs were used only to validate pre-dispatch denial behavior.
commands_not_executed: $WARPCTRL --output-format json drive list --type workflow (inside verified Warp terminal, logged-in user)
$WARPCTRL --output-format json drive inspect <DRIVE_OBJECT_ID_FROM_DRIVE_LIST> (inside verified Warp terminal, logged-in user)
$WARPCTRL --output-format json drive workflow run <WORKFLOW_ID_FROM_DRIVE_LIST> --arg validation=warpctrl (inside verified Warp terminal, logged-in user)
$WARPCTRL --output-format json input run "printf warpctrl-validation" (inside verified Warp terminal, logged-in user)
